summary: Critical bug testing for True Joy Birthing App. Backend API tests: 16/16 passed (100%). Two CRITICAL frontend bugs found.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Clicking 'Log Out' button does nothing on web platform. Root cause: React Native's Alert.alert() doesn't work on web - it silently fails without showing any confirmation dialog, so logout action never executes
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Replace Alert.alert() with a web-compatible solution like window.confirm() for web platform or use a custom modal component that works on both native and web

birth_plan_completion.calculation: WORKING CORRECTLY - Completion percentage is calculated based on sections with actual data
birth_plan_completion.note: Demo user shows 100% because all 9 sections have data populated in seed data - this is NOT a bug

verified_features.backend_logout: WORKING - Backend /api/auth/logout endpoint works correctly, clears session
verified_features.mom_team: WORKING - Returns providers correctly, Emily Thompson shows as expected
verified_features.marketplace: WORKING - Returns doulas and midwives correctly

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix logout button on web - Replace Alert.alert() in handleLogout() (profile.tsx line 183-199) with Platform-aware solution. Use window.confirm() for web or custom modal
Verify the fix works by: 1) Login as Mom 2) Go to Profile 3) Click Log Out 4) Confirm in dialog 5) Should redirect to welcome page
critical_code_review_comments: profile.tsx:183-199 - handleLogout uses Alert.alert which doesn't work on web platform. This blocks the logout confirmation and prevents logout action from executing
Similar Alert.alert usage found in other places (lines 175, 177, 202, 225, 245, 278, 280) - consider using web-compatible alert solution throughout the app

success_rate.frontend: Logout button broken on web (1 CRITICAL bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are working correctly. Critical frontend bug: logout button on Mom profile page doesn't work because Alert.alert doesn't show on web. Birth plan completion percentage is calculated correctly - demo shows 100% because all sections have data. Main agent needs to fix the Alert.alert issue in profile.tsx by using a Platform-aware approach or custom modal component.

bug_1_logout.description: Logout button on Profile page doesn't work on web
bug_1_logout.root_cause: React Native's Alert.alert() silently fails on web platform - no dialog shows, no action taken
reproduction_steps: 3. Click 'Log Out' button (red text at bottom)
4. Nothing happens - no confirmation dialog, user stays logged in
bug_1_logout.fix: Use Platform.OS === 'web' check and use window.confirm() or custom modal for web platform

bug_2_completion.description: Birth plan shows 100% complete even when expected to be empty
bug_2_completion.root_cause: NOT A BUG - Demo user seed data has all 9 sections populated with test data
bug_2_completion.verification: Verified via API that demo user has data in: about_me (5 fields), labor_delivery (1 field), pain_management (1 field), etc.
bug_2_completion.note: Completion calculation is correct - counts sections with any non-empty data values
